title: Vulnerability Prioritizer — EPSS Live Feed + KEV Sync Integration
description: vuln_prioritizer.py has composite risk scoring (EPSS × reachability × business_impact × controls) with FIRST.org EPSS API integration and CISA KEV alignment. test_smart_dedup.py confirms deduplication logic. Gap: EPSS scores are fetched per CVE on demand rather than bulk-synced daily, causing API rate-limit hits. KEV data is hardcoded as a list rather than synced from the live CISA KEV JSON feed.
missing: Daily EPSS bulk sync: background job fetches https://epss.cyentia.com/epss_scores-YYYY-MM-DD.csv and upserts all scores into epss_cache.db to avoid per-CVE API calls
Live CISA KEV sync: daily job fetches https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/feeds/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.json and updates kev_flag in vuln_prioritizer.db
Reachability pipeline integration: wire vuln_prioritizer to consume reachability results from iast_advanced.py so confirmed-reachable vulns get the 2.0x multiplier applied automatically
